title: Shankheshwar Jain Temple
tagline: Shankheshwar Jain Temple — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: The Shankheshwar Shwetambar Jain Tirth is located in the center of Shankheshwar town of Patan district, Gujarat, India.
overview.description: The Shankheshwar Shwetambar Jain Tirth is located in the center of Shankheshwar town of Patan district, Gujarat, India. The temple is dedicated to Parshwanath and is an important place of pilgrimage for the followers of Jainism.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shankheshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shankheshwar Jain Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shankheshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (99 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shankheshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shankheshwar Jain Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shankheshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shankheshwar Jain Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shankheshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shankheshwar, Panchasar.
